name: Gossamer Bio, Inc.

Overview We are a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on the development and commercialization of seralutinib for the treatment of pulmonary hypertension, or PH, including pulmonary arterial hypertension, or PAH, and PH 3 Table of Contents associated with interstitial lung disease, or PH-ILD.
